name: crude, wood-hafted spears
identity: A basic ranged weapon crafted from wood and used by the forest-dwelling warriors for hunting and combat.
current_status: Carried by two shadowy figures who have captured the player character, used as part of their ambush in the snow-covered forest.

description.value: Crude, wood-hafted spears used by forest-dwelling warriors for hunting and combat.

volatile_state.current_activity: Used by two shadowy figures to capture the player character.
